option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
spring.application.name=url-shortener-sb server.port=9000
spring.datasource.url=${DATABASE_URL} spring.datasource.username=${DATABASE_USERNAME} spring.datasource.password=${DATABASE_PASSWORD} spring.datasource.driver-class-name=com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver spring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto=update #spring.jpa.show-sql=true spring.jpa.properties.hibernate.dialect=${DATABASE_DIALECT}
jwt.secret=${JWT_SECRET} jwt.expiration=172800000 frontend.url=${FRONTEND_URL} google.safe-browsing.url=https://safebrowsing.googleapis.com/v4/threatMatches:find google.safe-browsing.api-key=${GOOGLE_SAFE_BROWSING_API_KEY} virustotal.url=https://www.virustotal.com/api/v3/urls virustotal.api-key=${VIRUSTOTAL_API_KEY} urlscan.api-key=${URLSCAN_API_KEY} urlscan.submit-url=https://urlscan.io/api/v1/scan/ urlscan.result-url-template=https://urlscan.io/api/v1/result/%s/ urlscan.poll.max-attempts=6 urlscan.poll.delay-ms=1500
# URL scanner configuration url.scan.max-length=120 url.scan.score.no-https=20 url.scan.score.long-url=20 url.scan.score.suspicious-keywords=20 url.scan.score.google-threat=60 url.scan.score.urlscan-malicious=40 url.scan.score.urlscan-suspicious=20 url.scan.score.redirect-depth=10 url.scan.score.domain-change=15 url.scan.score.typosquatting=20 url.scan.score.fake-domain=20 url.scan.score.suspicious-tld=15 url.scan.score.piracy-keywords=40 url.scan.score.query-param-spam=10 url.scan.score.ad-keywords=15 url.scan.score.external-unavailable=10 url.scan.suspicious-keywords=login,verify,bank,password,free,gift,wallet,update url.scan.suspicious-tlds=xyz,tk,top url.scan.piracy-keywords=movie,download,watch free,torrent url.scan.ad-keywords=ads,click,redirect,banner url.scan.trusted-domains=facebook.com,google.com,twitter.com url.scan.brand-domains=facebook,google,microsoft,instagram,amazon,paypal url.scan.threshold.suspicious=21 url.scan.threshold.unsafe=61
# URL scanner (Phase 5) cache configuration url.scan.cache.enabled=true url.scan.cache.ttl-seconds=600 url.scan.cache.max-size=500
# URL scanner (Phase 6) async job retention url.scan.async.job-retention-seconds=900 url.scan.async.max-jobs=200 url.scan.async.cleanup-interval-ms=60000 url.scan.async.timeout-ms=20000
logging.level.org.springframework.security=DEBUG logging.level.org.url.shortener=DEBUG logging.level.org.springframework.web=DEBUG logging.level.org.springframework=DEBUG logging.level.org.springframework.web.servlet=TRACE
